issues.description: Missing TrashCount condition. Card requires 'If you have 10 or more cards in your trash' but DSL has Always condition
Trigger should be 'Activated' (main ability activated by player), not 'OnPlay'
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' for 'until the end of your opponent's next turn', not 'EndOfBattle'
Secondary effect with Trigger and no condition should not exist. Card has only one effect.
Target should be 'ChooseOwnCharacter' only (up to 1 Character), not include Leader
